---
title: "Opportunities"
---

We welcome motivated students interested in quantitative pharmacology, systems biology, mathematical modeling, computational biology, and experimental biochemistry.

Potential research areas include:

- mechanistic modeling of biological systems
- enzyme kinetics and redox biology
- quantitative systems pharmacology
- antimicrobial adaptation and resistance
- cell-state heterogeneity and pharmacological escape
- model-informed experimental design

Students with backgrounds in pharmacy, biochemistry, biotechnology, engineering, mathematics, data science, or related fields are encouraged to get in touch.

## Contact

Interested students can contact Javiera Cortés by email.
